misc_summary: This file contains only front matter content including advertisements (Maytag washing machines, Southern Pacific railroad fares, Utah Power & Light, various L.D.S. garment manufacturers, paint products, business college, etc.), table of contents for the August 1929 issue, and publication information. No standalone articles, poems, editorials or stories are present - all content is legitimate miscellaneous material such as ads, masthead info, and contents listing.
